text: Prepare this matter for a formal legal notice. First structure the dispute facts into a chronology, identify the legal grounds, likely causes of action, demanded remedies, deadline language, litigation risk, and evidence support. Then tell me whether the case is notice-ready, what weaknesses remain, and what exact documents or facts should be collected before issuing the notice.
